priority_high: post_earnings|52wk_low|fcf_roic in source_bucket AND mkt_cap_tier in {mega,large}
priority_low: no bucket trigger matches high or medium criteria
triage_yes: already_analyzed=false AND priority=high AND confidence in {high,medium}
triage_maybe: priority=high but no fresh event catalyst (tracked only, no dislocation bucket)
triage_no: priority=medium AND style_tag in {speculative,cyclical} AND already_analyzed=true
priority=medium AND no compelling near-term catalyst AND already_analyzed=true

web_search_queries: large cap US stocks biggest earnings beats misses February March 2026
quality large cap stocks near 52 week low March 2026
highest free cash flow yield large cap stocks 2025 2026
best US sector leader stocks by market cap technology healthcare industrials consumer 2025
notes: BRK-B and V appeared in 52wk_low search results — both already in seed list; new bucket added to their entry.
CRM and NOW appeared in 52wk_low search results — both already in tracked list; new bucket added to their entry.
MSFT, NVDA, AAPL appeared in sector_leader search — already in seed/tracked lists; sector_leader bucket added.
RDDT (Reddit) excluded from post_earnings: small/mid cap, speculative, not fitting quality compounder criteria.
TEAM (Atlassian) excluded from post_earnings: flagged as down -48%, not a recovery candidate at this stage.
AT&T (T) and Verizon (VZ) included as fcf_roic entries with confidence=low given debt concerns.
AMAT already well-known; added to both fcf_roic and sector_leader buckets.
Sort order: priority=high first, then medium, then low; within same priority triage_rec=yes first, then maybe, then no.
